title: pithecoctenium carolinae
intro: Pithecoctenium carolinae, also known as the Panama hat plant or American basket hat, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Pithecoctenium carolinae include its potential to treat various conditions such as hypertension, arthritis, and fever, due to its antihypertensive, anti-inflammatory, and antipyretic properties. Herbal preparations of Pithecoctenium carolinae can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used in folk medicine to alleviate various health issues.
